baseUri.title: base_uri
baseUri.description: Optionally specify a base uri of the login UI. If unspecified the default URI will be used.

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description:
creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

 on read: the timestamp of the first event of the object

 on create: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization an object belongs to
